summary: Implemented read-only permission & role settings panel. Shows RBAC summary cards, role list, permission list grouped by category, role-permission matrix, user-role binding overview, and key permission status. No schema, migration, RBAC semantic, or write-path changes.

features: summary cards (roleCount, permissionKeyCount, userCount, userRoleBindingCount, systemSettingManagers, adjustmentManagers, importManagers, userManagers)
role list with builtIn flag, permission count, user count
permission list grouped by category, with critical flag
user-role binding overview (id, username, displayName, isActive, roles) — no sensitive fields
key permission status (which roles hold each critical permission)

readOnlyLimitations: module is builtIn: true for all roles
